career.message: A long-blocked opportunity will soon break open. Leadership and authority roles are aligned with your destiny this year. Trust sudden pivots — they are not detours but shortcuts forged by Fire.

love.message: Deep connection is within reach, but requires you to lower Capricorn's formidable walls. The stars favour vulnerability over strategy in matters of the heart. Someone steady and genuine is already in your orbit.

health.message: Energy levels are strong but sustainable only with deliberate rest. Burnout is the shadow of Fire. Prioritise sleep, movement, and moments of genuine stillness to keep the inner flame burning clean.

luck.message: Crimson — the colour of controlled fire and earned authority — draws fortune to your endeavours. Your luckiest windows occur on days whose digits sum to 7 or 8.

warning: The Master Teacher's greatest peril is selfless depletion. You may give so freely of your wisdom, time, and energy that you hollow yourself out before your greatest work is done. Guard your reserves with the same discipline you apply to your ambitions.
